perf_hint: one glow and a noise read per pixel — among the cheapest presets; the resolution is the only cost

params.name: anchor
params.description: Which of the nine grid positions the halo breathes in, the text card's vocabulary.

params.name: size
params.description: The halo's resting radius, as a fraction of the frame's short edge.

params.name: breathe
params.description: How much the loudness swells the halo.

params.name: softness
params.description: How long the halo's feather is; 0 is a lantern edge.

params.name: wobble
params.description: How much slow noise stirs the halo's rim.

params.name: swell
params.description: How much a hit swells the halo — gently, never a flash.

params.name: margin
params.description: How far the anchor point is inset from the frame's edges.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the halo.
